sentences.arabic: زَرَعَتِ الْبِنْتُ سَارَةُ بَذْرَةً صَغِيرَةً فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Djevojčica Sara je posadila malo sjeme u bašti.
sentences.translationEn: The girl Sara planted a small seed in the garden.

sentences.arabic: سَقَتِ الْبَذْرَةَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ وَانْتَظَرَتْ بِصَبْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Zalijevala je sjeme svaki dan i strpljivo čekala.
sentences.translationEn: She watered the seed every day and waited patiently.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ ظَهَرَ نَبْتٌ صَغِيرٌ مِنَ الأَرْضِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon sedmice se iz zemlje pojavio mali izdanak.
sentences.translationEn: After a week a small sprout appeared from the ground.

sentences.arabic: صَرَخَتْ سَارَةُ مِنَ الْفَرَحِ وَأَرَتْ أُمَّهَا النَّبْتَةَ.
sentences.translation: Sara je vrisnula od radosti i pokazala majci biljčicu.
sentences.translationEn: Sara cried out with joy and showed her mother the seedling.
